# Third-party sources

Vendored and attributed upstream material for 187WEB.

| Path | Project | Role |
|------|---------|------|
| `anthropic/theme-factory/` | Anthropic Theme Factory (when vendored) | Upstream theme packs for **187THEME** — keep Apache-2.0 LICENSE |
| `aigent/` | AIgent design materials (when vendored) | Knowledge fusion into Motion Lab skills — not a public brand |

## Policy

- **Do not** install AIgent as a second design system or skill (`187AIGENT` is rejected).
- **Do not** create `/187craft/studio` for third-party design systems.
- Theme Factory content maps to **187THEME** only.
- AIgent 3D/scroll/polish material maps into existing Motion Lab skills (`187HERO`, `187SCROLL`, `187GSAP`, …).
- Heavy media: prefer Git LFS or release artifacts; project only active assets into `public/`.

See root `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` for license summary.
